task: Lift the toy potato sitting in the silver pot on the upper left side of the stove. Pick it up and move the right side and down. Place it on the orange square at the lower right side of the stove.
raw:
Scene: toy_potato, silver_pot, stove, orange_cloth, blue_bottle
Step 1: reach(toy_potato)
  affordance_region: the toy potato in the silver pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, toy_potato, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, toy_potato) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(toy_potato)
  affordance_region: the body of the toy potato
  contact: holding(toy_potato) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(toy_potato)
Step 3: transport(toy_potato -> orange_cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the orange cloth
  spatial: above(toy_potato, orange_cloth, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(toy_potato)
  done_when: above(toy_potato, orange_cloth, 0.05)
Step 4: place(toy_potato -> orange_cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the orange cloth
  contact: surface_contact(toy_potato, orange_cloth) [completion]; released(toy_potato) [completion]
  pose: stable(toy_potato) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(toy_potato, orange_cloth) AND released(toy_potato) AND stable(toy_potato)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the toy potato in the silver pot
the body of the toy potato
an empty area on the orange cloth
an empty area on the orange cloth
steps.done_when: surface_contact(toy_potato, orange_cloth) AND released(toy_potato) AND stable(toy_potato)
